description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on push to master branch, tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master, while ignoring changes to README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and docs/. Configure the build type to Debug. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up the test framework with tools/setup_test_framework.bat, configures CMake with the build type, builds the project, and runs tests with ctest.
